Terraform will perform the following actions:

  # nebius_vpc_v1_network.workbench will be created
  + resource "nebius_vpc_v1_network" "workbench" {
      + name = "cosmos-proj-demo-network"
    }

  # nebius_compute_v1_disk.boot will be created
  + resource "nebius_compute_v1_disk" "boot" {
      + name = "cosmos-proj-demo-boot"
    }

  # nebius_compute_v1_instance.workbench will be created
  + resource "nebius_compute_v1_instance" "workbench" {
      + name = "cosmos-proj-demo"
    }

Plan: 9 to add, 0 to change, 0 to destroy.
